Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Oct-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Rita Choit Adler, Esq., for George Vaile, Plaintiff/Moving Party
James McKierman, Esq., for Carroll Burdick & McDonough, LLP Defendant/Opposing Party, (telephonic appearance).

No oral argument. Defendant failed to give notice of an intent to appear on tentative ruling. Tentative ruling adopted: Defendant George Vaile's Motion For Protective Order is denied. The court finds that the motion was brought without substantial justification. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,300, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's evidentiary objections are overruled. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
